description: The stable root of an Excalidraw scene. The exact source layout outside elements and files is retained as an opaque string so durable snapshots remain number-free.

template_json.description: Exact UTF-8 source with reserved internal markers in place of the elements and files container contents.

elements_tail_json.description: Exact whitespace between the last element and the closing array bracket.

files_tail_json.description: Exact whitespace between the last file and the closing object brace.

files_present.description: Whether the source contains a top-level files object.
